G0.reason: Local manifest, canonical, robots, security, cache and release tests pass, but the 2026-07-15 live verifier reported 317 issues against the still-unpromoted production site.

G1.reason: No written permission covering the current domain, region, sale/distribution and G2 flow has been supplied.

G2.reason: The business owner has not supplied publishable seller identity, address, service contact, shipping/refund facts, or real author/reviewer identities.

G3.reason: GSC, Bing, Baidu and Cloudflare analytics/log access plus seven clean days of event data have not been supplied.

G4.reason: No proposed data asset currently meets its source, method, sample, reviewer and expiry threshold.

migration.fallback: Enter the neutral-brand migration path if adequate written permission is still absent at the deadline.
